books.title: Injury Time
books.subtitle: Being the first night of Bikram Dey
books.description: A football match ends in a city-wide chase after Bikram makes three controversial calls.
books.setting: Salt City Arena, Kolkata — one night

books.title: No Contest
books.subtitle: Being the second night of Bikram Dey
books.description: A correct disqualification at a combat tournament puts Bikram in a syndicate's crosshairs.
books.setting: Sunrise Sports Complex, Kolkata — one night

books.title: The Last Ballot
books.subtitle: Being the third night of Bikram Dey
books.description: Assigned to protect an election, Bikram uncovers an institutional conspiracy.

books.title: The Glass Rulebook
books.subtitle: Being the fourth night of Bikram Dey
books.description: Officiating leads Bikram to uncover a high-level naval procurement conspiracy in Kolkata.

books.title: Ward
books.subtitle: Being the fifth night of Bikram Dey
books.description: While seeking rest in a rehab facility, Bikram uncovers a predatory data-harvesting scheme.
books.setting: Maitri Wellness and Rehabilitation Centre, Barrackpore — thirty-nine hours
